0.details:
Reassure them that they're doing their best
Focus on  healing not how far is the progress of healing
Remind them that I'm always there for them
Encourage them to always pray and have some affirmative words to keep them going
0.model_generation:
Hey there,

I want you to know you are doing your absolute best, even on the days when it feels like progress is invisible. Healing isn’t a race, and it doesn’t need to be perfect—it’s about taking each moment as it comes and honoring how far you’ve come in your own time. Please remember I am always here for you, ready to listen, to support, or just to sit quietly by your side. Take a moment each day to pause, breathe, and pray, trusting that each whispered hope carries strength into your heart. You are stronger than you realize, braver than you believe, and infinitely worthy of every bit of peace and joy that comes your way. Keep holding onto hope, keep lifting your prayers, and keep reminding yourself that you are not alone. I’m with you every step of the way.
0.final_version: Hey friend I know what you're going through is a lot but I want to remind you that you're going to be okay. You have made much progress so far even if it doesn't feel like that on your side but I'm here noticing every positive thing that you do. I'm so proud of you and even when things get tough, you don't give up and that says a lot about the kind of person you are. Remember that I'm always here for you no matter what whether you need someone to talk to, to vent with or just to sit quietly beside I've got you. Please continue to take care of yourself and give yourself permission to rest when you need it. Better days are coming and you'll get  through  this, I love you so  much and I believe in you completely.

1.details:
Offer a comfort and emotional support
Acknowledge the pain of the loss
A warm and funny memory that I've shared with my ex-boyfriend's mother
Special quality days that we once had together
1.model_generation:
Dear Michael,

I was heartbroken to learn of your mother’s passing. I know how deeply you loved her and how precious your time together was. While no words can fully ease this grief, please know I’m here for you.

I will always smile when I recall the time she insisted on teaching me to bake her famous blueberry scones and ended up wearing half the batter on her apron. Her laughter in that tiny kitchen still warms my memory.

Those afternoons we spent wandering through her garden, sipping lemonade and talking about everything from family stories to future dreams, remain some of the most treasured moments of my life.

May you find comfort in the love she shared and strength in the beautiful memories you created together. I’m here whenever you need a shoulder or a listening ear.

With love and deepest sympathy,

Emily
1.final_version:
Hi Thami
I was so saddened to hear about passing of your mother. I can't imagine how difficult this must be for you, and I want you to know that my thoughts are with you during this difficult time. I remember you sharing stories about how kind and warm your mom was and she brought life into your life. I hope you can take comfort in those cherished memories and in the love she gave you which will always be a part of who you are. Even though words can't ease the sorrow entirely, I hope you feel supported and cared for. Her memory will continue to live in your heart and in the hearts of all who knew her. Take care of yourself and allow yourself to grieve and remember her in your own time. I'm truly sorry for your loss should you need someone to talk me please don't hesitate to call me.

2.details:
Acknowledge that you told friend about cousin cheating
Express regret for tension actions caused
Explain intention wasn't to betray but to be honest and protect a friend
Reassure them that I value their relationship and want to build trust
2.model_generation:
Hey,

I want to apologize for telling you about my cousin’s cheating. I realize now that sharing that information caused tension between us, and I'm truly sorry for any distress it has created. My intention was never to betray your confidence or hurt you, but to be honest and protect you from being misled. I care about you and never meant for my actions to come between us.

I value our friendship deeply and regret that my decision strained the trust we share. I hope you can understand that my goal was to look out for you, even if I went about it the wrong way. I am committed to rebuilding our trust and ensuring that you can rely on me. Please let me know if there’s anything I can do to make things right.

Thank you for listening. I hope we can move forward and strengthen our relationship.

Sincerely,
Your friend
2.final_version:

Thank you for listening. I hope we can move forward and strengthen our relationship. I miss you

Sincerely,
Ase

3.details:
Mention their kindness made your significant other feel valued
Explain how their actions strengthened your trust and gratitude
Highlight the thoughtfulness and effort showing that it didn't go unnoticed
Close by expressing how much you truly appreciate their friendship and generosity
3.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I want to thank you from the bottom of my heart for your incredible kindness toward my partner. Your thoughtful actions not only made them feel truly valued but also reassured both of us that they are surrounded by people who care. Seeing how much effort you put into every detail did not go unnoticed; from the personalized welcome gift to the warm conversation you shared, every moment demonstrated your genuine concern.

Your generosity has deepened my trust and gratitude, reminding me how fortunate we are to have you in our lives. Through your support, you’ve shown the kind of friend who stands by us no matter what, and that means the world. I truly appreciate your friendship and all you do. I look forward to the chance to return your kindness soon. Thank you again for being such an amazing and generous presence.

With heartfelt appreciation,

4.details:
Share a recent life update
Mention a memory that reminded of your friend and made you think of them
Ask about what's new in their life
Express that you miss them
4.model_generation:
Hey there,

I hope you’ve been well. I wanted to share that I recently moved into a cozy apartment downtown, started a new role as a project coordinator at a local nonprofit, and even began volunteering at the neighborhood garden—which has been really rewarding. The weather here has been sunny, perfect for evening strolls by the riverbank. Last weekend I tried salsa dancing for the first time and loved it—it reminded me of that rainy afternoon when we attempted our first tango lesson and laughed until our sides hurt. Remembering that moment made me think of you and how much fun we always have together.

How have you been? What exciting changes or adventures are happening in your life? I really miss our coffee dates and spontaneous road trips. Let’s plan a call soon—I’d love to hear all about what’s new with you.

Looking forward to catching up soon!
4.final_version:
Hey there,

Looking forward to catching up soon!

5.details:
Share a funny memory that highlights their personality
Compliment them on qualities you admire
Positive wish for their future
End with toast of celebration that invites everyone to join in the joy
5.model_generation:
From the moment you decided to host our first movie night—and insisted on blasting the soundtrack at full volume—you’ve shown a fearless spirit and a knack for turning every gathering into an adventure. I still laugh thinking about the time you accidentally sent that karaoke performance video to your boss instead of me, then danced through the embarrassment with unmatched grace.

Your kindness makes strangers feel like old friends, your creativity turns everyday moments into cherished memories, and your unwavering optimism lights our darkest days. I admire your honesty, your generosity, and the way you make courage look effortless.

As you step into this new chapter, may laughter fill your days, may bold dreams guide your path, and may love and success follow you wherever you go.

Please raise your glass to celebrate not just a birthday, but the remarkable person we all adore. To you, cheers!
